verse_text: But into the second part the high priest went alone once a year, not without blood, which he offered for himself and for the people's sins committed in ignorance;

links.context: As high priest, Zacharias prayed not for a son, but for the atonement of the sins of Israel ([[HEB.9:7]]). Gabriel's (v. 19) announcement reveals both that Zacharias' prayer for atonement will be answered and that Elizabeth will conceive a son. This atonement will be announced by John, who will identify Christ as "the Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world" ([[JOH.1:29]]).
